---
title: "Schedule and Material"
author: "Davi Moreira"
# date-modified: "last-modified"
# date: "2026-08-01"
# date-format: "MMM D, YYYY"
editor: visual
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .overflow-table {
    font-size: 0.85rem; /* Smaller font for compact display */
    width: 100%; /* Ensure the table fits within page width */
    line-height: 1.2; /* Tighter line spacing */
  }
  .overflow-table th, .overflow-table td {
    padding: 0.3rem; /* Reduce padding for compact layout */
    text-align: left; /* Left-align for readability */
    word-wrap: break-word; /* Wrap long text within cells */
    vertical-align: top; /* Align cell content to the top */
  }
  .overflow-table th:nth-child(1), .overflow-table td:nth-child(1) {
    width: 0%; /* Increase width of the first column */
  }
  .overflow-table th:nth-child(4), .overflow-table td:nth-child(4) {
    width: 25%; /* Increase width of the first column */
  }
  .overflow-table th:nth-child(6), .overflow-table td:nth-child(6) {
    width: 8%; /* Increase width of the first column */
  }
  .below-table {
    font-size: 0.85rem; /* Match the font size of the table */
    line-height: 1.2; /* Match line height */
    margin-top: 1rem; /* Add spacing above the text */
  }
</style>
```

<center>

*DRAFT — Fall 2026 skeleton (MWF, 90 min, Aug 24 – Oct 9). Topic sequence mirrors the previous edition; sections, dates, and materials to be finalized during the course redesign.*

</center>

<br>

::: overflow-table
| **Week** | **Day** | **Date** | **Topic** | **Book Sections\*** | **Slides** | **Data** | **Supplementary Materials** |
|--------|--------|--------|--------|--------|--------|--------|--------------------|
| **1** | **M** | Aug 24 | Course Intro & Descriptive Statistics | Syl.; Ch. 1, 3 | [slides](/lecture_slides/01_chapter_data_statistics/01_chapter_data_statistics.html){target="_blank"} | . | . |
| **1** | **W** | Aug 26 | Descriptive Statistics | Ch. 3 | [slides](/lecture_slides/02_chapter_descriptive_statistics/02_chapter_descriptive_statistics.html){target="_blank"} | . | . |
| **1** | **F** | Aug 28 | Probability | Ch. 4 | [slides](/lecture_slides/03_chapter_probability/03_chapter_probability.html){target="_blank"} | . | . |
| **2** | **M** | Aug 31 | Decision Analysis | Ch. 19 | [slides](/lecture_slides/04_chapter_decision_analysis/04_chapter_decision_analysis.html){target="_blank"} | . | **Homework 1 assigned** |
| **2** | **W** | Sep 02 | Discrete Probability Distributions | Ch. 5 | [slides](/lecture_slides/05_chapter_discrete_probability_distributions/05_chapter_discrete_probability_distributions.html){target="_blank"} | . | . |
| **2** | **F** | Sep 04 | Discrete Probability Distributions | Ch. 5 | [slides](/lecture_slides/05_chapter_discrete_probability_distributions/05_chapter_discrete_probability_distributions.html){target="_blank"} | . | . |
| **3** | **M** | Sep 07 | **LABOR DAY — No Class** | — | . | . | . |
| **3** | **W** | Sep 09 | Continuous Probability Distributions | Ch. 6 | [slides](/lecture_slides/06_chapter_continuous_probability_distributions/06_chapter_continuous_probability_distributions.html){target="_blank"} | . | . |
| **3** | **F** | Sep 11 | Continuous Probability Distributions | Ch. 6 | [slides](/lecture_slides/06_chapter_continuous_probability_distributions/06_chapter_continuous_probability_distributions.html){target="_blank"} | . | . |
| **4** | **M** | Sep 14 | Sampling Distributions & Interval Estimation | Ch. 7, 8 | [slides](/lecture_slides/07_chapter_interval_estimation/07_chapter_interval_estimation.html){target="_blank"} | . | **Homework 2 assigned** |
| **4** | **W** | Sep 16 | Sampling Distributions & Interval Estimation | Ch. 7, 8 | [slides](/lecture_slides/07_chapter_interval_estimation/07_chapter_interval_estimation.html){target="_blank"} | . | . |
| **4** | **F** | Sep 18 | **Midterm Review** | Cumulative (to date) | . | . | . |
| **5** | **M** | Sep 21 | **In-Class Midterm** | — | . | . | **Midterm Exam** |
| **5** | **W** | Sep 23 | Hypothesis Testing I | Ch. 9 | [slides](/lecture_slides/08_chapter_hypothesis_tests/08_chapter_hypothesis_tests.html){target="_blank"} | . | . |
| **5** | **F** | Sep 25 | Hypothesis Testing I | Ch. 9 | [slides](/lecture_slides/08_chapter_hypothesis_tests/08_chapter_hypothesis_tests.html){target="_blank"} | . | . |
| **6** | **M** | Sep 28 | Hypothesis Testing II — Two Populations | Ch. 10 | [slides](/lecture_slides/09_chapter_hypothesis_tests_two_populations/09_chapter_hypothesis_tests_two_populations.html){target="_blank"} | . | . |
| **6** | **W** | Sep 30 | Simple Regression | Ch. 14 | [slides](/lecture_slides/10_chapter_simple_regression/10_chapter_simple_regression.html){target="_blank"} | . | . |
| **6** | **F** | Oct 02 | Simple Regression | Ch. 14 | [slides](/lecture_slides/10_chapter_simple_regression/10_chapter_simple_regression.html){target="_blank"} | . | . |
| **7** | **M** | Oct 05 | Multiple Regression | Ch. 15 | [slides](/lecture_slides/11_chapter_multiple_regression/11_chapter_multiple_regression.html){target="_blank"} | . | **Homework 3 assigned** |
| **7** | **W** | Oct 07 | Multiple Regression | Ch. 15 | [slides](/lecture_slides/11_chapter_multiple_regression/11_chapter_multiple_regression.html){target="_blank"} | . | . |
| **7** | **F** | Oct 09 | **Final Review** | Cumulative | . | . | . |
| **—** | — | TBD | **Final Exam (Details in the Course Syllabus)** | Cumulative | . | . | **Final Exam** |
:::

::: below-table
\* Section numbers refer to chapters in the course textbook (to be confirmed during the redesign).

Slide decks were adapted from previous course editions and will be revised for QM 6700. Podcast/video and supplementary links will be added as materials are developed.
:::
